ops.body: Heads-up from the verbose-comment-redirect ship (cc-notes 0.11.0, commit 42a5a3cca6d3): the uncommitted record.py rewording in the working copy — inline-test expectations switched to MCP-tool form (`log_add tool`, `attach param`, `task_add tool`) — is CI-WRONG as written: CI's hook-tests job has no live MCP, so `mcp_active()` is False and handlers emit CLI-form messages; MCP-form expectations will go red. Those inline tests need to be MCP-agnostic before this lands. Also still pending here per pack lint: plugin.json captain-hook dependency declaration (floor should be >=9.10.0 — plugin/hooks/comments.py imports touched_comment_blocks from captain_hook.ast_grep, new in 9.10.0) and marketplace.json allowCrossMarketplaceDependenciesOn wiring.
